title: NoEnchantBookCap
description: Removes the restriction/limits in anvils when applying an enchanted book with above vanilla levels to an item.
body:
Lightweight plugin that removes the limitations in anvils when applying enchanted books that are above the vanilla level cap. Doesn't allow combining two books with a vanilla level to a non-vanilla level. You have to get the books through commands.

For feature requests or bug reports, dm me on discord. User: viboten
